name: Zaryad Compute
one_liner: Sparse attention kernels that run on consumer GPUs with 8GB of VRAM.
discovery_note: Surfaced by proximity in the contributor graph, not by search volume. Visibility percentile 0.07; three of six contributing sources are not in English.

founders.name: Kseniya Morozova
founders.resolution_note: Three romanizations plus one Cyrillic form resolved to a single entity via a shared repository URL. Without the merge this founder appears as four people, each with a quarter of the evidence - which is exactly how this founder normally stays invisible.
founders.institution_note: Recorded as a neutral biographical fact. Not an input to any score - Invariant #3.

evidence.span: commit c81b204 "blocksparse: tile so the working set fits 8GB; the point is the cheap card"
"Мы показываем снижение потребления памяти на 61% при потере качества менее 1% на последовательностях до 32k токенов."
evidence.span_translated: "We show a 61% memory reduction with under 1% quality loss at sequence lengths up to 32k."

evidence.span: commit 3d0c8f5 "int8 KV path: 32k context inside 8GB, accuracy delta table in bench/README"
v0.5.0 — "int8 KV path stable. 63 dependent repos, most of them in languages I do not read."
"Два года я поддерживаю эту библиотеку одна."
evidence.span_translated: "I have maintained this library alone for two years."

evidence.span: v0.3.0 — "32k context on a 3060. Benchmarks reproduce with one script and no cluster."

gate.rationale: Twenty months of compounding technical output with reproducible benchmarks. Low visibility, high substance.

would_be_missed_by: any filter keyed on institution or region

claims.claim_text: 61% memory reduction with under 1% quality loss at 32k context
claims.corroborating_span: v0.3.0 — "32k context on a 3060. Benchmarks reproduce with one script and no cluster."
claims.note: The benchmark harness is public and reruns, which is what carries the verification. The publication venue is irrelevant to the verdict.

trace_note: Non-English spans are shown in the original with a translation alongside. The original is the evidence; the translation is a convenience.
